title.ko: 적층체, 즉 평평하거나 평평하지 않은 형상, 예. 세포상 또는 벌집 구조, 의 층으로 조립된 제품
title.en: LAYERED PRODUCTS, i.e. PRODUCTS BUILT-UP OF STRATA OF FLAT OR NON-FLAT, e.g. CELLULAR OR HONEYCOMB, FORM

definition.ko: 다음의 특징이 있는 적층체 구조 일반적인 형 B32B1/00, B32B3/00 층의 구조 B32B3/00, B32B5/00 층사이의 관계 B32B7/00 사용된 물질 역청질 또는 타르질 물질, 수경성 물질 B32B11/00, B32B13/00 금속, 유리, 세라믹, 광물섬유 또는 입자 B32B15/00, B32B17/00, B32B18/00, B32B19/00 나무, 종이, 셀룰로우스계 플라스틱 B32B21/00, B32B29/00, B32B23/00 고무, 합성수지 B32B25/00, B32B27/00 그 밖의 물질 B32B9/00 그것의 성질 B32B33/00 적층체의 제조 적층 방법 또는 장치 B32B37/00 부수적 조작 B32B38/00 감시 또는 제어 B32B41/00 그 외의 조작, 예. 보수 B32B43/00

title.en: Layered products having a non-planar shape
Tubular products

title.ko: 외부 또는 내부의 불연속성 또는 요철이 있는 층 또는 비평면 형태의 층으로 구성된 레이어드 제품; 특정 형태의 특징을 갖는 층으로 구성된 레이어드 제품
title.en: Layered products comprising a layer with external or internal discontinuities or unevennesses, or a layer of non-planar shape; Layered products comprising a layer having particular features of form

definition.ko: 이 그룹에 있어서는 홈(CHENNELS), 공극(VOIDS), 및 공동 (CAVITIES)부분은 공기이외의 재료(예. 기체, 액체, 기타 층의 재료와 다른 재료)로서 충전되어도 무방하다

title.en: characterised by features of form at particular places, e.g. in edge regions
characterised by a layer folded at the edge, e.g. over another layer
for securing layers together; for attaching the product to another member, e.g. to a support
characterised by added members at particular parts
characterised by a discontinuous layer, i.e. apertured or formed of separate pieces of material
characterised by a layer of regularly-arranged cells whether integral or formed individually or by conjunction of separate strips, e.g. honeycomb structure
characterised by a face layer formed of separate pieces of material
secured to a flexible backing
characterised by an internal layer formed of separate pieces of material
of hollow pieces, e.g. tubes; of pieces with channels or cavities
of spaced pieces
characterised by an apertured layer, e.g. of expanded metal

title.ko: 연속 층의 단면 윤곽의 특수 형상을 특징으로 하는 것, 내부 공극 또는 공동을 가진 층을 특징으로 하는 것 (규칙적인 셀(cell) B32B 3/12)
title.en: characterised by a particular shape of the outline of the cross-section of a continuous layer; characterised by a layer with cavities or internal voids (regular cells B32B0003120000)
characterised by a layer comprising a deformed thin sheet, e.g. corrugated, crumpled (B32B0029080000 takes precedence)
characterised by a layer formed with recesses or projections, e.g. grooved, ribbed

title.ko: 층의 불균질 또는 물리적인 구조를 특징으로 하는 적층체(B32B 9/00～ B32B 29/00 이 우선)
title.en: Layered products characterised by the non-homogeneity or physical structure of a layer (B32B0009000000-B32B0029000000 take precedence)

definition.ko: 이 그룹에 있어서는 층을 형성하거나 또는 층에 포함되는 섬유, 섬조(FILAMENTS), 미립, 또는 분말이 합성수지와 같은 물질 속에 함침 되거나, 상호 결합되거나, 매립될 수도 있다. 만일 섬유 또는 그와 유사한 물질, 또는 함침(IMPREGNATING) 되거나, 결합되거나, 매립되는 물질에 중요성이 있다면 물질별로 적절한 그룹에 분류된다

title.en: characterised by structural features of a layer comprising fibres or filaments
characterised by a layer being specifically extensible by reason of its structure or arrangement
characterised by a fibrous layer needled to another layer, e.g. of fibres, of paper
the fibres or filaments of a layer being specially arranged or being of different substances
characterised by a fibrous layer reinforced with filaments
characterised by the relative arrangement of fibres or filaments of adjacent layers
characterised by a layer differing constitutionally or physically in different parts, e.g. denser near its faces
characterised by features of a layer formed of particles, e.g. chips, chopped fibres, powder
characterised by features of a layer containing foamed or specifically porous material
foamed in situ
characterised by the presence of two or more layers which comprise fibres, filaments, granules, or powder, or are foamed or specifically porous
one layer being a fibrous or filamentary layer
another layer also being fibrous or filamentary
impregnated with or embedded in a plastic substance
one layer comprising granules or powder
both layers being foamed or specifically porous

title.ko: 층간의 관계를 특징으로 하는 적층체; 층간 특징의 상대적 배향, 또는 층간 측정 가능한 파라미터의 상대값에 특징을 갖는 적층체, 즉. 다른 물리적, 화학적 또는 물리화학적 특성을 갖는 층을 포함하는 제품; 층의 상호 연결을 특징으로 하는 적층체
title.en: Layered products characterised by the relation between layers;  Layered products characterised by the relative orientation of features between layers, or by the relative values of a measurable parameter between layers, i.e. products comprising layers having different physical, chemical or physicochemical properties;  Layered products characterised by the interconnection of layers
Physical, chemical or physicochemical properties
Mechanical properties
Optical properties
Electric or magnetic properties
Thermal properties
Heat-shrinkability

title.ko: 특징의 배향에 따라 (섬유 또는 필라멘트의 방향 B32B5/12)
title.en: with respect to the orientation of features  (direction of fibres or filaments B32B0005120000)
using arrangements of stretched films, e.g. of mono-axially stretched films arranged alternately
Interconnection of layers

title.ko: 층이 전체 표면에 연결되지 않은 것, 예. 불연속적인 연결 또는 패턴화된 연결 (이격된 배치에 적용된 접착제 또는 본딩 물질의 사용 B32B7/14)
title.en: the layers not being connected over the whole surface, e.g. discontinuous connection or patterned connection (using interposed adhesives or bonding materials applied in spaced arrangements B32B0007140000)
permitting easy separation
by mechanical means

title.ko: 꿰메기, 바느질 또는 재봉에 의한 것 (섬유층의 바느질에 의한 것 B32B5/06)
title.en: by stitching, needling or sewing (by needling fibrous layers B32B0005060000)
at least one layer having inter-reactive properties
using interposed adhesives or interposed materials with bonding properties
applied in spaced arrangements, e.g. in stripes

title.ko: 본질적으로 그룹 B32B 11/00～ B32B 29/00 에 포함되지 않는 특수물질로 이루어진 적층체
title.en: Layered products characterised by particular substances used

title.ko: 본질적으로 그룹 B32B 11/00～ B32B 29/00 에 포함되지 않는 특수물질로 이루어진 적층체

title.ko: 적층의 방법 또는 장치, 예.경화 결합 또는 초음파 결합에 의한 것
title.en: Methods or apparatus for making layered products; Treatment of the layers or of the layered products

title.ko: 적층의 방법 또는 장치, 예.경화 결합 또는 초음파 결합에 의한 것
title.en: Methods or apparatus for laminating, e.g. by curing or by ultrasonic bonding
characterised by a sequence of laminating steps, e.g. by adding new layers at consecutive laminating stations
characterised by the partial melting of at least one layer
characterised by the heating method
characterised by the cooling method
characterised by the pressing technique, e.g. using direct action of vacuum or fluid pressure
characterised by using adhesives
characterised by the properties of the layers
with at least one layer being manufactured and immediately laminated before reaching its stable state, e.g. in which a layer is extruded and laminated while in semi-molten state
with all layers existing as coherent layers before laminating
involving the assembly of discrete sheets or panels only
involving the assembly of continuous webs only
involving the assembly of both discrete and continuous layers

title.ko: ･･ 적어도 1개의 적층전 미리 형성되어 있지 않은 층을 가지는 것, 예.소재상에 따돌려진 과립장의 물질로부터 만들어진 것(B32B 37/15가 우선)
title.en: with at least one layer not being coherent before laminating, e.g. made up from granular material sprinkled onto a substrate (B32B0037150000 takes precedence)
with at least one layer which influences the bonding during the laminating process, e.g. release layers or pressure equalising layers
involving assembly of non-flat intermediate products which are flattened at a later step, e.g. tubes
